title: Support recursive functions (and/or better error)
body:
The code below builds on Cadence Xcelium but fails in Verilator:

/verilator --version
Verilator 4.200 2021-03-12 rev v4.110-43-g5022e81af (mod)

./verilator --cc test2.sv
```
%Error: test2.sv:6:16: Found definition of 'log2_f' as a VAR but expected a task/function
    6 |         return log2_f(a/2) + 1;
      |                ^~~~~~
%Error: Exiting due to 1 error(s)
```

-- test2.sv --
```
module fred;
   function automatic int log2_f(int a);
      if (a == 1)
        return 0;
      else
        return log2_f(a/2) + 1;
   endfunction // log2_f
endmodule
```
